message:
test(mux_pool): harden health-check test assertions

Capture the error returned by health_check / health_check_with_cx and
assert the variant matches MuxPoolError::Mux(SocketNotFound | _) so
future refactors that change error variants will break the tests rather
than silently passing.  Also assert recovery_attempts == 0 and
recovery_successes == 0 in all three affected tests to fully cover the
stats snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
